title: picea firma
intro: Picea firma, also known as Japanese black spruce, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to Japan and the Russian Far East. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Picea firma include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as protecting against respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the bark and needles of the tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
